mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.title, t.author, t.user_id, t.priority, t.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, t.deadline, t.display_order, t.status, t.completed, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM todo_attachments ta WHERE ta.todo_id = t.id) AS has_attachment, t.created_at FROM todos t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category_id = c.id
t.user_id = #{userId}
AND
t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND t.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY
t.title t.completed
CASE t.priority WHEN 'LOW' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 3 ELSE 2 END
c.name t.deadline t.display_order t.created_at
ASC DESC

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.author, t.user_id, t.priority, t.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, t.deadline, t.display_order, t.status, t.completed, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM todo_attachments ta WHERE ta.todo_id = t.id) AS has_attachment, t.created_at FROM todos t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category_id = c.id
t.user_id = #{userId}
AND
t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND t.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY
t.title t.completed
CASE t.priority WHEN 'LOW' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 3 ELSE 2 END
c.name t.deadline t.display_order t.created_at
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.author, t.user_id, t.priority, t.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, t.deadline, t.display_order, t.status, t.completed, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM todo_attachments ta WHERE ta.todo_id = t.id) AS has_attachment, t.created_at FROM todos t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category_id = c.id
t.user_id = #{userId}
AND
t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY t.id

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.author, t.user_id, t.priority, t.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, t.deadline, t.display_order, t.status, t.completed, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM todo_attachments ta WHERE ta.todo_id = t.id) AS has_attachment, t.created_at FROM todos t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category_id = c.id WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.author, t.user_id, t.priority, t.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, t.deadline, t.display_order, t.status, t.completed, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM todo_attachments ta WHERE ta.todo_id = t.id) AS has_attachment, t.created_at FROM todos t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category_id = c.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
AND t.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (title, author, user_id, priority, category_id, deadline, display_order, status, completed) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{userId}, #{priority}, #{categoryId}, #{deadline}, COALESCE(#{displayOrder}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 'TODO'), #{completed})

INSERT INTO todos (title, author, user_id, priority, category_id, deadline, display_order, status, completed) VALUES
(#{todo.title}, #{todo.author}, #{todo.userId}, #{todo.priority}, #{todo.categoryId}, #{todo.deadline}, COALESCE(#{todo.displayOrder}, 0), COALESCE(#{todo.status}, 'TODO'), #{todo.completed})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, color FROM categories ORDER BY id

SELECT c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, COUNT(t.id) AS task_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN todos t ON c.id = t.category_id AND t.created_at >= #{start} AND t.created_at < #{endExclusive} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.color ORDER BY c.id
